description: Curated visual direction patterns for short-form video. The LLM selects a pattern id per story (never invents colors); the compiler resolves it deterministically. Portrait/landscape typography is pre-tuned per pattern.

calm-tech.name: Calm Tech
calm-tech.description: Dark navy, cool blue accents. Product updates, engineering stories, dashboards.

warm-documentary.name: Warm Documentary
warm-documentary.description: Warm dark browns with amber accents. Human stories, interviews, retrospectives.

bold-pop.name: Bold Pop
bold-pop.description: High-energy near-black with vivid pink accents. Announcements, launches, hype shorts.

fresh-clarity.name: Fresh Clarity
fresh-clarity.description: Light background with deep green accents. How-to guides, educational explainers.

midnight-executive.name: Midnight Executive
midnight-executive.description: Graphite and gold. Business results, strategy briefings, premium positioning.
